flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Catawba Valley Community College rose 200% between 2006 and 2009 (4.0% → 12.2%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Catawba Valley Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.8% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Catawba Valley Community College fell 41% between 2017 and 2020 ($8.4k → $4.9k).
